title: ds-viz-punchcard - option matrix (dark)
description: Test bench for splunk.punchcard. Verifies all options from the 10.4 PDF: x/y/size/category DOS bindings, bubbleColor (dynamic gradient), bubbleLabelDisplay (all|max|off), bubbleRadiusMin/Max, bubbleRowScale (global|row), bubbleSizeMin/Max, bubbleSizeMethod (radius|area), colorMode (dynamic|categorical), legendDisplay, seriesColors, showDefaultSort, showDynamicBubbleSize, showMaxValuePulsation, backgroundColor.

ds_logins_hour_day.name: logins by hour x weekday - canonical punchcard shape

options.query: | makeresults count=168 | streamstats count AS rn | eval punch_hour = (rn-1)%24 | eval punch_day = case(((rn-1)/24)%7==0,"Mon", ((rn-1)/24)%7==1,"Tue", ((rn-1)/24)%7==2,"Wed", ((rn-1)/24)%7==3,"Thu", ((rn-1)/24)%7==4,"Fri", ((rn-1)/24)%7==5,"Sat", 1==1,"Sun") | eval base = case(punch_hour>=8 AND punch_hour<=18,80, punch_hour>=19 AND punch_hour<=22,30, 1==1,5) | eval weekend_factor = if(punch_day=="Sat" OR punch_day=="Sun", 0.3, 1.0) | eval punch_count = round(base * weekend_factor + random()%20) | table punch_hour punch_day punch_count

ds_logins_with_region.name: logins by hour x weekday with region color

options.query: | makeresults count=168 | streamstats count AS rn | eval punch_hour = (rn-1)%24 | eval punch_day = case(((rn-1)/24)%7==0,"Mon", ((rn-1)/24)%7==1,"Tue", ((rn-1)/24)%7==2,"Wed", ((rn-1)/24)%7==3,"Thu", ((rn-1)/24)%7==4,"Fri", ((rn-1)/24)%7==5,"Sat", 1==1,"Sun") | eval punch_count = round(20 + random()%80) | eval punch_region = case(rn%4==0,"emea", rn%4==1,"amer", rn%4==2,"apac", 1==1,"latam") | table punch_hour punch_day punch_count punch_region

ds_attacks_hour_day.name: SOC pattern - failed logins by hour x weekday

options.query: | makeresults count=168 | streamstats count AS rn | eval punch_hour = (rn-1)%24 | eval punch_day = case(((rn-1)/24)%7==0,"Mon", ((rn-1)/24)%7==1,"Tue", ((rn-1)/24)%7==2,"Wed", ((rn-1)/24)%7==3,"Thu", ((rn-1)/24)%7==4,"Fri", ((rn-1)/24)%7==5,"Sat", 1==1,"Sun") | eval night = if(punch_hour<6 OR punch_hour>22, 50, 5) | eval failures = round(night + random()%30) | table punch_hour punch_day failures

| makeresults count=168 | streamstats count AS rn | eval punch_hour = (rn-1)%24 | eval punch_day = case(((rn-1)/24)%7==0,"Mon", ((rn-1)/24)%7==1,"Tue", ((rn-1)/24)%7==2,"Wed", ((rn-1)/24)%7==3,"Thu", ((rn-1)/24)%7==4,"Fri", ((rn-1)/24)%7==5,"Sat", 1==1,"Sun") | eval punch_count = if(punch_hour==12 AND punch_day=="Wed", 1000, round(5 + random()%30)) | table punch_hour punch_day punch_count

options.markdown:
# `splunk.punchcard` - option matrix

Punchcards visualize cyclical patterns: bubble size at each (x, y) cell shows a metric, optionally tinted by a fourth field. Best for hour x weekday, dimension x dimension intensity.

Verified options from the **10.4 PDF**:
- DOS bindings: `x`, `y`, `size`, `category` + `*Field` labels
- `colorMode` (`dynamic` | `categorical`)
- Bubble sizing: `bubbleRadiusMin/Max` (1, 15), `bubbleSizeMin/Max` (0.25, 1), `bubbleSizeMethod` (`radius` | `area`), `bubbleRowScale` (`global` | `row`)
- Labels: `bubbleLabelDisplay` (`all` | `max` | `off`)
- Color: `bubbleColor` (DOS gradient), `seriesColors`, `backgroundColor`
- Toggles: `showDefaultSort`, `showDynamicBubbleSize`, `showMaxValuePulsation`
- `legendDisplay` (`right` | `off`)

viz_default.title: 1. Default - hour x day x count

viz_categorical.title: 2. colorMode=categorical with region
viz_categorical.description: Color comes from a fourth field. seriesColors palette assigns one per region.

viz_label_max.title: 3. bubbleLabelDisplay=max
viz_label_max.description: Show value only on the largest bubble.

viz_label_off.title: 4. bubbleLabelDisplay=off
viz_label_off.description: All labels hidden. Cleaner editorial style.

viz_row_scale.title: 5. bubbleRowScale=row
viz_row_scale.description: Each row scales independently. Reveals patterns inside low-volume rows.

viz_radius_method.title: 6. bubbleSizeMethod=radius
viz_radius_method.description: Default is 'area'. 'radius' makes large values grow more aggressively.

viz_radius_max.title: 7. bubbleRadiusMax=24
viz_radius_max.description: Default cap is 15. Bigger bubbles for headline panels.

viz_no_pulsation.title: 8. showMaxValuePulsation=false
viz_no_pulsation.description: Default pulses the max bubble. Off for static screenshots.

viz_no_dynamic_size.title: 9. showDynamicBubbleSize=false
viz_no_dynamic_size.description: All bubbles render at the same radius. Useful when you only care about color.

viz_legend_off.title: 10. Categorical + legendDisplay=off
viz_legend_off.description: Color carries semantic meaning but legend is suppressed for compact tiles.

viz_soc_pattern.title: 11. SOC pattern - failed logins by hour x day
viz_soc_pattern.description: Investigation lens: night-time clustering becomes visible.

viz_default_sort.title: 12. showDefaultSort=true
viz_default_sort.description: Sorts the y-axis using a built-in heuristic (chronological where applicable).

viz_tinted.title: 13. backgroundColor + custom seriesColors
viz_tinted.description: Custom panel background paired with brand palette in categorical mode.
